globaluserpage-desc: Si toos ah ayuu uga soo qaadaa bogagga isticmaalayaasha wiki dhexe
globaluserpage-editnotice: Boggan hadda wuxuu muujinayaa bog isticmaale oo ka yimid wiki kale. Haddii aad halkan ku abuurto bog cusub, ma sii muujin doono bogga wiki-ga kale.
globaluserpage-central-editnotice: Boggan isticmaalaha waxaa lagu [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:GlobalUserPage muujin doonaa] wiki-yada kale haddii bog isticmaale maxalli ah uusan halkaas ka jirin.
globaluserpage-footer: Waxa aad ku aragto boggan waxaa laga [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:GlobalUserPage soo guuriyay] [$2 $2].
